title: ulex sparsiflorus
intro: Ulex sparsiflorus, also known as the gorse or furze, is a spiny, evergreen shrub native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Ulex sparsiflorus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Ulex sparsiflorus can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically for therapeutic purposes.
